step_1_pipeline.description: Full pipeline: Pagegen → Draft → Approve → Publish → Public URL (200) → Sitemap

step_1_pagegen_phase.note: Pagegen worker executed successfully, AI fallback working

step_1_page_index_after_approve.note: Status transitioned to 'published' by rule16_publish_draft RPC

step_1_public_url_proof.note: Public URL serves 200; catch-all [...slug]/page.js reads page_index WHERE status='published' and renders it

step_1_sitemap_proof.note: Sitemap route queries page_index WHERE status='published' and includes the slug in XML

step_2_repeatability.description: Second pagegen run on fresh slug, no queue conflicts, no duplication

step_2_no_duplication.note: No queue conflicts; first draft still exists unmodified; second run created separate draft

step_3_seo_validation.description: SEO API functional; page_index indexing_status correctly set

step_3_seo_api.note: GET /api/admin/seo returns 200; overrides list can be extended

step_3_page_indexing_status.note: Newly published pages have indexing_status='pending' (default behavior; requires manual enable for 'indexed')

step_4_backup.description: Backup POST creates real filesystem snapshot; GET lists it correctly

step_4_backup_create.note: POST /api/admin/backups creates timestamped directory with 14 table snapshots + manifest

step_4_backup_get_list.note: GET /api/admin/backups returns the backup created above

step_5_crm_scoring.description: Two leads with different attributes score differently; CRM flow functional

step_5_lead_1_organic_high_interest.note: Scorer returned 100; worker routed lead to agent

step_5_lead_2_paid_low_interest.calculation: 50 (base) + 0 (paid not in high-quality list) + 0 (age not in 25-45) + 0 (low interest) + 0 (no email) = 50
step_5_lead_2_paid_low_interest.note: Scorer returned 50; worker still routed lead (routing is separate from scoring)

step_5_crm_variation.note: Scoring is NOT static; it varies based on lead attributes

next_step.description: Deploy current state to Vercel production, then repeat all 5 steps against the live URL
next_step.expected_result: Same results over HTTPS from bimasakhi.com
